subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of the Blessed Perfection! Thy letter was received. It was written in Persian. I was very much pleased… I earnestly hope that thou wilt memorize all the Persian poems
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
